name: Square Cross-Stitched Floral Pillow with Printed Green/Pink - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Create a delightful look in your space with the Square Cross-Stitched Floral Pillow with Print from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This square pillow features a cross-stitched pattern with a floral print for a beautiful look that amps up the elegance of your space. Made with a soft cotton-linen blend exterior and 100% polyester filling, this printed pillow feels soft and comfortable as you rest on it.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
